introSection:
John Wick: Open Contract is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It opened for the 2022 season, along with Now You See Me: High Roller.

The ride is based on the John Wick media franchise.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride system was manufactured for the cancelled Six Flags Dubai, but never setup.

The attraction was announced alongside Now You See Me: High Roller on 19 October 2020. They would be located in the Lionsgate themed area, which was being expanded.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide identical in layout to Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and the Joker rides at many other Six Flags theme parks.

fullText:
John Wick: Open Contract is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It opened for the 2022 season, along with Now You See Me: High Roller.

The ride is based on the John Wick media franchise.

The ride system was manufactured for the cancelled Six Flags Dubai, but never setup.

The attraction was announced alongside Now You See Me: High Roller on 19 October 2020. They would be located in the Lionsgate themed area, which was being expanded.

This coaster is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide identical in layout to Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and the Joker rides at many other Six Flags theme parks.
